dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires fade (mean reversion) trades when price extends beyond Bollinger Bands with momentum and volume confirmation. Entry conditions check for band breach (close beyond bb_upper/bb_lower), RSI extremes (>70 or <30 indicating extension), and volume confirmation (vol_ratio_20 > 1.0). Exit conditions trigger when price returns to mean (sma_20). Standard stop loss set to 2% as typical for mean reversion. Max hold period set to 10 bars as reasonable default for reversion trades. Context-dependent direction allows both long fades (short extension) and short fades (long extension).

source_rule_text: A trader should only initiate fade (mean reversion) trades when price has moved beyond the volatility bands, indicating true market extension rather than equilibrium, combined with strict risk management.
